channel.description: Latest marine jobs for Passenger And Cruise
channel.title: Maritime Union - Job for Mariners

item.title: [Gold Job] Nurse / Healthcare Assistant for Passenger Cruise Ship at
[Gold Job] Purser on cruise ships at

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Vessel type: Support Platform, Jack Up

Joining date: 02.02.2026

Salary: $97.29 per day

Contract duration: 8 weeks on/off

Requirements: Good English level; to be in possession of Offshore OPITO BOSIET (with CA-EBS or EBS) = FOET (with CA-EBS or EBS) = HUET with EBS certificate.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Steward on Support Platform - Offshore OPITO BOSIET Required at EUROCREW LTD
[Gold Job] Nurse for Passenger Cruise Ship at
[Gold Job] Looking for Cruise Director on Sailing Passenger vessel at
[Gold Job] Nurse for Passenger Cruise Ship at

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Do you love working with kids and creating unforgettable adventures? As Youth Staff, you’ll turn playtime into magic, guiding children and teens through games, activities, and themed events — all while sailing to breathtaking destinations.

What we’re looking for:

  • Experience working with children (schools, camps, clubs, etc.)
  • Creativity, energy, and a big smile
  • Team spirit in an international environment
  • Good command of English (other languages are a plus!)

Why join MSC?

  • Travel the world while doing what you love
  • Be part of a fun, dynamic, multicultural team
  • Grow your career in hospitality and entertainment

Make every day an adventure — join MSC Cruises as Youth Staff and create memories that last a lifetime.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Youth Staff – MSC Cruises – Childcare and Entertainment Jobs at World of Seamen Group

item.description:
Location:
Description:

MSC Cruises is looking for talented Photographers to join our international team on board!

If you have a passion for storytelling through your lens, love working with people from all over the world, and dream of waking up every day to a new horizon – this is your chance!

  • Capturing unforgettable guest moments on board and on shore
  • Creating beautiful, high-quality images that bring the cruise experience to life
  • Working in a dynamic, multicultural team

We’re looking for someone with:

  • Experience in photography (portrait/event/lifestyle)
  • English and German communication skills
  • A positive attitude and creativity that shines


Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Photographer – MSC Cruises – Multinational Team at World of Seamen Group

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Dreaming of working where the sea meets the sky? Join the crew of MSC Cruises — one of the world’s leading cruise lines! From breathtaking destinations to life-changing experiences, every day onboard feels like an adventure. We’re now hiring passionate and motivated crew members for various positions! Start your journey today — your office could look like this!



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Various Cruise Positions – MSC Cruises – Join the Adventure at World of Seamen Group

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Imagine working surrounded by the ocean, luxury brands, and happy guests from all over the world. As a Shop Seller onboard MSC Cruises, you’ll turn shopping into an unforgettable experience — helping guests find the perfect souvenirs, jewelry, perfumes, and gifts while sailing to breathtaking destinations.

What we’re looking for:

  • Previous retail or customer service experience
  • Excellent English communication skills
  • A passion for sales, people, and travel

Why you’ll love it:
You’ll live and work on a luxury cruise ship, meet amazing people, and grow your career with one of the world’s leading cruise lines.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Shop Seller – Luxury Cruise Ship – MSC Cruises at World of Seamen Group
